title: Star Wars (2015) 65
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 65}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 65}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-65.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 65 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=[[Angel Unzueta]] |inker=Angel Unzueta |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=[[Gerald Parel]] |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[May 1]], [[2019]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/71191/star_wars_2015_65|text=Star Wars (2015) #65}} |pages=24 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=c. [[2 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 65 to around [[2 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=65 }} '''''Star Wars'' 65''' is the sixty-fifth issue of the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Kieron Gillen]], illustrated by [[Angel Unzueta]], and published on [[May 1]], [[2019]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''"THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN" PART 4. Her planet under threat, a heroic princess battles to save it! Not Leia – it's QUEEN TRIOS OF SHU-TORUN, ally to Darth Vader and the Empire! PRINCESS LEIA'S plan begins to unfold. But some members of her strike team have schemes of their own. When will Leia realize just what she's set in motion?!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN
Part IV |text=Queen Trios of Shu-Torun's betrayal allowed the evil Galactic Empire to launch a surprise attack against the Rebel Alliance's fleet and nearly crushed their heroic cause once and for all. Princess Leia Organa, along with Luke Skywalker, Han Solo and a crack strike team that includes Benthic's Partisans, infiltrated and locked down Shu-Torun. With Trios and the world's leadership trapped, Luke and the Partisans attacked! Now, Luke prepares to sabotage the Spike, and the planet's infrastructure along with it. But Benthic has other plans....}} ==Plot summary== In the [[Abyssal Rooms]] of [[Shu-Torun]], the Grand Marshal informed Queen Trios that the only way to breach the walls was with explosives or mining equipment. He warned her that exposure to the external temperatures would ignite flesh in seconds. Despite the danger, the Queen demanded they choose a course of action. Meanwhile, at the Imperial Retreat, [[Meorti]] received an update from Chewbacca on Luke and the [[Partisans]]. Deep within the Spike, Luke and the Partisans were engaged in a fierce blaster fight with Shu-Torun guards. While the Partisans provided cover, Luke single-handedly eliminated the remaining guards with his blaster and lightsaber. He instructed R2-D2 to set the room to explode, and they raced to escape before it went off. With one more target remaining, [[Benthic]] noted they were too far underground to contact the others. A Partisan warned Benthic that hyper-charging the final core would destroy the entire planet, not just the device. Benthic gave the order to proceed, stating they would not turn back from punishing the guilty. Back in the Abyssal Rooms, the Grand Marshal reported that a transport had been prepared. The Queen assured the assembled officials that the core temperature would hold long enough for their rescue, but she had to focus on saving their world. When some of the nobility argued she was abandoning them, the Queen countered that many lives are sacrificed for Shu-Torun's survival. She and her guards departed for the surface. On the vessel, she noted the situation was a massive security failure that could only have been carried out through her personal controls. She ordered the ship to head to the Imperial Retreat. Aboard his [[Star Destroyer]] in the [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]], [[Commander]] [[Kanchar]] received an urgent message from a team stranded on [[Hubin]]. They reported an imminent rebel attack on Shu-Torun. Kanchar, unsurprised given the Queen's betrayal of Leia and the rebels, ordered rescue vessels to assist the Shu-Torun. In the Spike, the rebels secured the last core and set explosive charges. Benthic ordered R2-D2 to initiate the hyper-charge, and Luke was shocked as the Spike began to light up. He confronted Benthic, who explained that the Partisans do not harm their enemies when they can kill them. He intended to tear Shu-Torun apart and make it [[Jedha]]'s twin. Luke protested that the plan wasn't fair, and the Partisans responded by pointing their blasters at him. Luke gave R2-D2 a cryptic command, and the droid released a burst of fog, blinding the Partisans and allowing Luke to escape. He wondered how he could stop them. Nearby, the Queen's ship detected a critical malfunction in the Spike. The Queen observed gravity modulations and failing generators—a hyper-charge was in progress. Realizing the rebels intended to destroy the planet, she ordered her ship to take back the system at the Retreat to free her army. At the Retreat, Leia, Han, and the other rebels prepared for the Queen's ship to land. Leia suddenly realized the ship was moving too fast and had no intention of landing. It crashed onto the landing pad and began firing on the rebels before smashing into the Retreat. A firefight erupted between the rebels and the Shu-Torun guards. Kanchar's Star Destroyer sped toward Shu-Torun. Kanchar ordered an orbital bombardment of the Imperial Retreat, dismissing his officer's protest that it was a holy site. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 65}}
